data.title: STS Global Income & Growth Trust PLC Purchases Own Shares
data.description:
STS Global Income & Growth Trust PLC ( (GB:STS) ) has issued an update.

STS Global Income & Growth Trust PLC announced the purchase of 100,000 of its own ordinary shares at an average price of 240.25 pence per share, which will be held in treasury. This transaction affects the company’s share capital, with a total of 120,936,415 issued ordinary shares excluding treasury shares. This move is part of the company’s strategy to manage its share capital and potentially enhance shareholder value.

More about STS Global Income & Growth Trust PLC

STS Global Income & Growth Trust PLC operates in the financial industry, focusing on investment management. The company primarily deals with income and growth investment strategies, targeting a diverse range of market opportunities to enhance shareholder value.

Average Trading Volume: 145,247

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.title: Fuller, Smith & Turner Announces Director Share Transactions
data.description:
Fuller Smith & Turner ( (GB:FSTA) ) has shared an update.

Fuller, Smith & Turner P.L.C. announced recent share transactions by individuals with managerial responsibilities within the company. Independent Non-Executive Director Jane Bednall purchased 1,250 shares, while Juliette Stacey’s children acquired a total of 936 shares. These transactions reflect ongoing confidence in the company’s market performance and are part of regulatory disclosures under the EU Market Abuse Regulation.

More about Fuller Smith & Turner

Fuller, Smith & Turner P.L.C. is a company operating in the hospitality industry, primarily known for its pubs, hotels, and brewing operations. The company focuses on providing quality food and drink services, with a market presence that emphasizes traditional British hospitality.

data.title: GoGold Resources Files Final Prospectus for $75 Million Offering
data.description:
The latest update is out from GoGold Resources ( (TSE:GGD) ).

GoGold Resources has filed a final short form prospectus for its $75,002,200 bought deal public offering of common shares, priced at $1.82 per share, with the potential to raise an additional $11,250,330 if the over-allotment option is fully exercised. The offering, expected to close on April 4, 2025, has received conditional approval from the Toronto Stock Exchange, and aims to bolster the company’s financial position and market presence, although the shares will not be available in the United States.

More about GoGold Resources

GoGold Resources is a Canadian-based company specializing in silver and gold production, with a focus on operating, developing, exploring, and acquiring high-quality projects in Mexico. The company operates the Parral Tailings mine in Chihuahua and is involved in the Los Ricos South and North exploration and development projects in Jalisco. Headquartered in Halifax, Nova Scotia, GoGold aims to build a portfolio of low-cost, high-margin projects.

YTD Price Performance: 47.56%

Average Trading Volume: 166,244

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $402.7M

data.title: Protector Forsikring ASA Transfers Danish WC Portfolio to DARAG
data.description:
Protector Forsikring ASA ( (PSKRF) ) has provided an update.

Protector Forsikring ASA has entered into an agreement with DARAG Deutschland to transfer its entire workers’ compensation portfolio in Denmark, pending regulatory approvals. This transaction will eliminate Protector’s exposure to the Danish WC market, with limited impact on its solvency margin and result, and is expected to be completed by Q3 2025.

More about Protector Forsikring ASA

data.title: Natural Health Trends Approves Phantom Share Awards
data.description:
An update from Natural Health Trends ( (NHTC) ) is now available.

On April 1, 2025, Natural Health Trends Corp. announced the approval of phantom share awards under its Phantom Equity Plan. The awards, which include 124,850 shares for President Chris T. Sharng and 41,788 shares for CFO Timothy S. Davidson, have a two-year vesting period with conditions tied to the company’s financial performance and stock appreciation. These awards aim to incentivize key executives and directors, potentially impacting the company’s operational focus and aligning stakeholder interests with performance metrics.

data.title: Workspace Group Announces Change in BlackRock’s Voting Rights
data.description:
Workspace Group plc R.E.I.T. ( (GB:WKP) ) has issued an announcement.

Workspace Group PLC has announced a change in the voting rights held by BlackRock, Inc., a major stakeholder. The notification indicates that BlackRock’s total voting rights in Workspace Group have decreased from 9.91% to 9.61%, reflecting a slight reduction in their stake. This adjustment in holdings could influence the company’s governance and decision-making processes, impacting its strategic direction and potentially affecting shareholder interests.

More about Workspace Group plc R.E.I.T.

Workspace Group PLC is a UK-based real estate investment trust (REIT) that specializes in providing flexible office spaces and commercial properties. The company primarily focuses on serving small to medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) and entrepreneurs, offering tailored work environments to support business growth and innovation.

data.title: International Paper Grants Incentive Stock Units to CFO
data.description:
The latest update is out from International Paper Co ( (IP) ).

International Paper Company announced the grant of Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) and Performance Stock Units (PSUs) to Lance T. Loeffler, the Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, as part of their 2025 Long-Term Incentive Plan. These grants are designed to align the interests of key executives with company performance, with PSUs vesting based on performance objectives and RSUs vesting over three years, potentially impacting the company’s executive retention and motivation strategies.

More about International Paper Co

International Paper Company is a global leader in sustainable packaging solutions, focusing on the production and distribution of paper and packaging products. The company operates in the paper industry and is listed on the NYSE and LSE under the symbols IP and IPC, respectively.

data.title: Land Securities Group PLC Announces Change in Voting Rights
data.description:
Land Securities Group plc REIT ( (GB:LAND) ) has provided an update.

Land Securities Group PLC, a major player in the UK real estate sector, has announced a change in its voting rights structure due to BlackRock, Inc.’s acquisition or disposal of voting rights. BlackRock, a prominent investment management corporation based in the USA, now holds a total of 10.27% of voting rights in Land Securities Group PLC, reflecting a slight decrease from the previous notification. This adjustment in voting rights could influence the company’s governance and strategic decisions, impacting stakeholders and potentially altering its market position.

data.title: Synertone Communication Corporation Appoints New Auditor
data.description:
Synertone Communication Corporation ( (HK:1613) ) has shared an update.

Synertone Communication Corporation announced a change in its auditor, with HLB Hodgson Impey Cheng Limited resigning due to a disagreement over audit fees for the 2025 financial year. Prism Hong Kong Limited has been appointed as the new auditor, as recommended by the Audit Committee, due to its competitive audit fee proposal and extensive experience with listed companies in Hong Kong. The company assures that this change will not materially impact its operations or the 2025 audit, and it is considered beneficial for stakeholders.

More about Synertone Communication Corporation

Synertone Communication Corporation is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, operating within the communication industry. It is listed on the Stock Exchange of Hong Kong Limited and focuses on providing communication services.
